title: Define MeshCore compatibility minimum command matrix
description: Why this exists: MeshCore research found a byte-command local API with mandatory startup, device info, contacts, messaging, and async event behavior, plus many repeater/admin flows that should not silently drop. What needs to be done: classify MeshCore commands as mandatory, optional, stubbed, or unsupported for LICHEN compatibility and define response codes. Acceptance criteria: matrix covers CMD_DEVICE_QUERY, CMD_APP_START, contacts, direct/channel text, battery/storage, stats, custom vars, auto-add config, ACK/message push, repeater/admin/login/binary/control/raw flows; unsupported commands return deterministic RESP_CODE_ERR or documented no-op.
